name: love-hurts-enchanted-rose-cathedral
founder_lock_quote: Love Hurts should be Beauty and the beast inspired with the enchanted rose as a focal point
scene_description: Photorealistic cinematic enchanted-cathedral scene — fairy-tale romantic atmosphere inspired by classic Beauty and the Beast storybook illustrations. Beautiful gothic cathedral interior in soft evening light, elegant vaulted stone arches and ribbed columns with romantic shadowed depth on both sides. Center-foreground: ornate stone pedestal sculpted with delicate intertwined rose motifs, holding a tall hand-blown glass dome containing a single perfect red rose — softly lit from within by a warm amber inner glow, the rose serves as the gentle spotlight of the scene. A soft warm halo radiates from the dome. A delicate shaft of warm amber and rose-pink light filters through a high stained-glass rose window in the upper-right of the frame, with dust motes drifting in the beam. Soft burgundy velvet drapery lines the stone columns. Scattered red rose petals rest on the polished stone floor around the pedestal base. Wrought-iron candelabra in the mid-background hold lit candles casting small pools of warm amber light. The polished stone floor gently reflects the warm rose glow.

color_palette.highlight: ethereal warm-amber glow from inside dome + candle amber
color_palette.petals: deep blood-red scattered, some wilted purple-edge

lighting.fill_light: stained-glass rose window shaft (deep crimson directional)
lighting.exposure_mood: Cocteau Beauty/Beast intensity — fairy-tale gothic, NOT Disney polish
lighting.shadows: deep, vast, swallowing edges of frame; rose dome reverses shadow only at its glow halo

camera.perspective: interior gothic cathedral nave, looking down central aisle toward pedestal
camera.angle: slight upward hero angle on rose pedestal so dome reads monumental
camera.lens_mood: 85mm cinematic, shallow depth, dome in razor-sharp focus, columns softly receding
depth_cues: vaulted arches + candelabra far background (deep shadow)
stained-glass rose window upper-right (dramatic shaft of light)
camera.composition: 3:4 portrait, vertical stone columns + arches frame the centered rose dome
camera.atmospheric_fog: incense haze in shafts of stained-glass light, dust motes in candle pools

skyyrose_dna: Love Hurts collection — heritage of love and protection. The rose under glass: protected, fragile, kept. Romantic fairy-tale cathedral atmosphere with classic storybook elegance. Crimson and burgundy palette with warm candlelight.

focal_anchor.object: single perfect red rose under a tall hand-blown glass dome
focal_anchor.position: center-foreground, on ornate stone pedestal sculpted with rose motifs
focal_anchor.detail: softly lit from within by warm amber glow, the gentle focal point of the frame with a soft halo of warm light
focal_anchor.rationale: The enchanted rose under glass — the romantic centerpiece of the cathedral chamber

product_staging_zones.fit: draped over a smaller adjacent stone pedestal or carved wooden stand, receding into shadow
product_staging_zones.lighting_match_directive: let product receive amber candelabra rim light + reflected crimson glow from rose dome; do NOT overpower the rose

product_staging_zones.fit: draped over candelabra arm or stone ledge, in candle-amber pool
laid flat on polished stone floor among scattered petals, near pedestal base
hung from wrought-iron candelabra against column, deep shadow

negative_prompts: no people, no human figures, no silhouettes
no oversaturated Disney-style polish, no cartoon stylization
no daylight, no outdoor scene, no exterior
no products outshining the rose under glass (rose is the focal point)
no faces in stained glass (abstract floral patterns only)

atmospheric.mood: enchanted, romantic, gentle, the rose softly illuminates the cathedral chamber
atmospheric.sound_implied: soft candle wick warmth, gentle hush of large stone interior
